title: Old biomes
description: This mod will bring back the removed biomes from the game of minecraft. These biomes were removed with the adventures update in beta 1.8.
body:
Ice Desert: Unlike the regular desert, the ice desert is covered with snow and ice; in addition, there are no cacti or dry bushes in the ice desert.

Tropical Forest(Rainforest):The rainforest has oak trees and lots of tall grass and ferns.

shurbland:A biome with few trees and no tall grass. It is identical to the savanna biome. Along with swampland, it was one of the smallest biomes in the game.

Seasonal Forest:This biome is located near regular and rain forests and plains. Seasonal forest, unlike regular forest, contains fewer trees and tall grasses; it also lacks birch trees. In the seasonal forest, water bodies are more common than in the regular forest.

If you found a bug or have a suggestion email us at : infernalcraft678@gmail.com
